provider_settings.hint: Configure the AI model used by the memory system

embedding_provider_id.hint: Embedding model ID for generating memory vectors. Leave empty to use AstrBot default. Check existing Embedding Provider IDs in AstrBot admin panel (e.g., openai_embedding)

llm_provider_id.hint: LLM model ID for summarizing conversations and evaluating memory importance. Leave empty to use AstrBot default. Models with strong reasoning capabilities are recommended

webui_settings.hint: Enable visual memory and session management via browser

host.hint: 127.0.0.1 for localhost only; 0.0.0.0 to allow LAN access

port.hint: WebUI service port, ensure it doesn't conflict with AstrBot main port (default 6185)

access_password.hint: Password required for WebUI login. Leave empty for auto-generated random password (shown in logs). Manual setup recommended

session_timeout.hint: Session validity after login, requires re-login after timeout. Default 3600 (1 hour)

session_manager.hint: Manage user session state and conversation history caching behavior

max_sessions.hint: Maximum number of sessions kept in memory (LRU eviction). Least recently used sessions are removed from cache but remain in database

session_ttl.hint: Sessions are removed from cache after being inactive for this duration. Default 3600 (1 hour)

context_window_size.hint: Maximum historical messages sent to LLM. Larger values provide richer context but consume more tokens. Recommended: 20-100

recall_engine.hint: Control memory retrieval and injection into conversations

top_k.hint: Number of most relevant memories returned per retrieval. Recommended: 3-10

max_k.hint: Maximum memories returned when agent proactively calls long-term memory retrieval. Recommended: 5-10

importance_weight.hint: Weight coefficient for memory importance in hybrid scoring. Higher values prioritize more important memories

fallback_to_vector.hint: Automatically fall back to pure vector retrieval when hybrid retrieval fails or returns empty. Recommended

injection_method.hint: Position where memories are injected into LLM request. user_message_before: as user message prefix; system_prompt: append to system prompt; user_message_after: as user message suffix; fake_tool_call: inject as fake tool call messages into conversation history

auto_remove_injected.hint: Automatically delete previously injected memory fragments before injecting new ones to avoid duplication and token waste. Recommended

importance_decay.hint: Gradually reduce old memory importance over time to prevent outdated information from maintaining high weight

decay_rate.hint: Daily decay ratio for memory importance. 0.01 means 1% decrease per day. Set to 0 to disable

fusion_strategy.hint: Fusion parameters for BM25 and vector retrieval results (internally uses RRF algorithm)

rrf_k.hint: Smaller values emphasize top-ranked results, larger values produce smoother fusion. Recommended: 30-120, default 60

use_persona_filtering.hint: Only recall memories related to current persona when enabled. Different personas don't interfere

use_session_filtering.hint: Each session's memories are stored independently when enabled. Sessions don't share memories

reflection_engine.hint: Control when to trigger conversation summarization and memory generation

summary_trigger_rounds.hint: Trigger summarization and memory writing after this many conversation rounds (one Q&A pair = one round)

graph_memory.hint: When enabled, maintains both document route and graph route, both supporting keyword and vector retrieval, with unified fusion of recall results

enabled.hint: Automatically build graph nodes, edges and vector indexes when enabled. Recommended

document_route_weight.hint: Document route fusion score weight in final dual-route ranking

graph_route_weight.hint: Graph route fusion score weight in final dual-route ranking

cross_route_bonus.hint: Extra score added when same memory is hit by both document and graph routes

expansion_limit.hint: Maximum candidate entries when expanding from hit node to neighbors in graph keyword retrieval

max_topics_per_memory.hint: Maximum topics nodes extracted from one memory

max_participants_per_memory.hint: Maximum participants nodes extracted from one memory

max_facts_per_memory.hint: Maximum key_facts extracted from one memory into graph index

migration_settings.hint: Control database version upgrade behavior on plugin startup

auto_migrate.hint: Automatically detect and upgrade old database versions on plugin startup. Recommended

create_backup.hint: Automatically create backup before migration to prevent data loss. Recommended

index_rebuild_settings.hint: Control batch size, Embedding request rate and failure tolerance for /lmem rebuild-index. Low-end servers should keep lower concurrency

batch_size.hint: Number of memories read per batch from documents table. Larger values increase memory peak and failure impact. Recommended: 25-100

embedding_batch_size.hint: Number of texts per Embedding API request. Reduce if provider has strict TPM limits

tasks_limit.hint: Internal concurrency limit for batch Embedding. Default 1 to avoid API rate limits

max_retries.hint: Maximum retries after an Embedding batch failure

retry_base_delay.hint: Exponential backoff base wait time after batch failure. At least 30 seconds for 429/TPM rate limits

batch_delay.hint: Extra wait between document read batches to actively reduce overall rebuild rate

request_delay.hint: Wait time between Embedding API sub-requests. Increase if frequently hitting 429/TPM

max_failure_ratio.hint: During full vector rebuild, only switch to new index if failure ratio doesn't exceed this. 0.02 means max 2% failure allowed

backup_settings.hint: Automatically backup memory database daily to prevent accidental data loss

enabled.hint: Automatically backup database after daily decay task. Recommended

keep_days.hint: Old backups beyond this many days are automatically deleted. Default: 7 days

forgetting_agent.hint: Periodically clean up old memories with low importance to control memory database size

auto_cleanup_enabled.hint: Automatically clean up eligible old memories after daily importance decay

cleanup_days_threshold.hint: Memories older than this enter cleanup candidacy. Must also have importance below threshold to be deleted

cleanup_importance_threshold.hint: Only old memories with importance below this value are cleaned up. 0.3 means below 30% importance
